data.title: Thomson Reuters Reminds Non-Canadian Taxable Shareholders of "Opt-Out" Alternative for Return of Capital
data.description: Investors holding Thomson Reuters shares (TSX/Nasdaq: TRI) outside Canada must act promptly to opt out. Deadlines differ by intermediary, some before April 27, 2026. The company, based in Toronto, issued this reminder on April 14, 2026.
UK's Chancellor Reeves proposes less than £10 bln defense spend over 4 years - The Times.

data.title: Uber Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call
data.description: Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) is set to host its quarterly conference call to review its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on Wednesday, May 6th at 5:00 a.m. PT (8:00 a.m. ET). The live webcast of the call and related earnings documents will be available on the Investor Relations page of Uber’s website at investor.uber.com. An archive of the call will be available for a minimum of 90 days for those unable to tune in live. Uber stated its intention to abide by disclosure guidelines.

data.title: Mark Herr Communications Issues Statement Regarding the Seventh Circuit’s Decision to Grant Bail to Anne Pramaggiore
data.description: Anne Pramaggiore, a former executive, has been granted bail after three months in prison due to a new trial being ordered by the Seventh Circuit Court of Appeals. This decision was influenced by recent Supreme Court rulings that dismissed the government's arguments. The swift action of the Seventh Circuit in granting bail is appreciated, and it is noted that Pramaggiore's imprisonment, which has lasted for three months, is deemed unjust given the circumstances of the case.

data.title: CoW Swap DAO advises users to avoid site due to 'hijacking', warns against accessing platform following frontend exploit.
data.description: Following a frontend exploit, the decentralized exchange aggregator is cautioning users against visiting its website.

data.title: HYPE reaches 2026 peak with $45 price, but weak spot volume and rising leverage suggest market momentum could wane.
data.description: The value of HYPE surged to $45, marking a significant increase. However, reports indicate low trading volumes in key areas and an uptick in the utilization of leverage, suggesting that the current market momentum may soon diminish.

data.title: Novellia Wins 2026 Fierce Outsourcing Award for Innovation in Drug Development
data.description: Novellia's groundbreaking patient-authorized real-world data (RWD) platform is being acknowledged for its significant impact on advancing biopharma research. The platform is built solely on data voluntarily provided by patients for medical research. The recognition was received in New York on April 14, 2026, elevating Novellia's status as a major player in this field. This platform showcases a unique approach by allowing patients to actively contribute, ultimately shaping the future of biopharma research.

data.title: Askey and Bloxtel Announce Strategic Partnership to Accelerate Global Deployment of Autonomous and Decentralized Private 5G Infrastructure
data.description: On April 14, 2026, in Taipei, Askey Computer Corp., a renowned company in networking and communications manufacturing, partnered with Bloxtel Inc., a trailblazer in decentralized private 5G infrastructure. This collaboration aims to work together in producing and expanding the advanced technology for the upcoming generation.

data.title: Quaker Houghton Announces Amended Credit Agreement; Extends Debt Maturities and Increases Available Credit
data.description: Quaker Houghton, a leading provider of industrial process fluids based in Conshohocken, Pennsylvania, disclosed on April 14, 2026, that it has finalized an amended credit agreement dubbed the "Amended Agreement." This move involves collaboration with a mix of current and fresh holders and lenders of the company. As part of the agreement, Quaker Houghton has engaged with specific parties in its NYSE listing under the symbol KWR. The company's commitment to optimized financial strategies and partnerships is underscored by this recent development.

data.title: AAR awarded $305 million follow-on C-40A contract for U.S. Navy and Marine Corps
data.description: AAR CORP, a prominent aviation services provider to commercial and government operators, MROs, and OEMs, has recently secured a significant contract worth around $305 million. This contract involves providing contractor logistics support for various operations.

data.title: Hub Group (HUBG) Shares Crater Amid Admitted Improper Accounting - Hagens Berman
data.description: On April 14, 2026, in San Francisco, shareholders of Hub Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: HUBG) experienced a significant decline of more than 27% in the value of their stock during trading on February 6, 2026. This was in response to the company's recent filing of a report cautioning that its quarterly statements dating back to March 31, 2025 "should no longer be relied upon."

data.title: Boyer Launches AI "Strike Force" to Drive Immediate Market Wins; Appoints Industry Veteran Rob Kline to Lead Strategic GTM
data.description: On April 14, 2026, in Minneapolis, Boyer, a leading Microsoft Solutions Partner, unveiled a major strategic change by introducing the AI Agent Strike Force. This specialized unit is dedicated to swiftly achieving concrete successes in AI Agent implementation. The initiative aims to accelerate the deployment of AI technology and enhance performance across various sectors.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Shows Its Strength; Nvidia, Palantir Make These Moves (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Tuesday, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase following unexpected inflation data. Google stock reached an early buying point during the trading session. The latest happenings in the stock market show the Nasdaq demonstrating its resilience. Notable movements were observed in companies such as Nvidia and Palantir. This information was part of live coverage provided by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Antalpha Platform Holding Company Announces Resignation of Chief Operating Officer and Chief Executive Officer, U.S. and EMEA
data.description: Antalpha Platform Holding Company, a prominent fintech firm (Nasdaq: ANTA) in Singapore, shared news of Mr. Derar Islim's resignation as Chief Operating Officer and Chief Executive Officer for the U.S. and EMEA operations. The resignation will be effective from April 30, 2026. Antalpha specializes in offering financing, technology, and risk management solutions to institutions within the digital asset industry.

data.title: Brown & Brown announces appointment of Eileen Akerson as chief legal officer
data.description: Eileen Akerson has been appointed as the new chief legal officer of Brown & Brown, with immediate effect. Akerson had been serving in the interim capacity since January 2026.

data.title: Novo Resources Strengthens Exploration Leadership with Appointment of Experienced Geologist Mr. Rohan Williams
data.description: Novo Resources Corp. has reported that Rohan Williams, a seasoned Exploration Geologist, will assume the role of Novo’s General Manager of Exploration starting April 15, 2026. Novo, also referred to as the Company, operates under the tickers ASX: NVO, TSX: NVO, and OTCQX: NSRPF. This announcement was made out of Perth, Australia, on April 14, 2026.
